channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Russian soldiers testify to BBC about commanders executing troops for refusing orders in Ukraine war
item.description: In a BBC documentary titled 'The Zero Line: Inside Russia's War', two Russian soldiers, Ilya and Dima, who have fled the country, described witnessing severe brutality within their own military on the...

item.title: UK Company Director Sentenced for Supplying Aircraft Engine Parts with Forged Safety Documents
item.description: A British company director has been sentenced to four years and eight months in prison after admitting to a major fraud involving aircraft engine parts worth nearly £7 million. Jose Alejandro Zamora Y...

item.title: Police officer killed and two injured in explosion outside Moscow's Savyolovsky Station
item.description: An explosion outside Savyolovsky Station Square in Moscow has left one police officer dead and two others injured, according to Russia's Interior Ministry. The incident occurred shortly after midnight...

item.title: How AI Digital Twins Are Assisting People in Managing Diabetes and Obesity
item.description: As the demand for expensive GLP-1 drugs rises, a Silicon Valley startup, Twin Health, is offering an alternative using AI and wearable devices to help people manage diabetes, obesity, and prediabetes....

item.title: Overview of the Current Situation in the Ukraine-Russia Conflict
item.description: The conflict in Ukraine is approaching its fifth year, with Russian forces gradually expanding control, primarily in eastern regions such as Luhansk and Donetsk (the Donbas), as well as attempting adv...

item.title: The Fascinating Life of Domesticated Silk Moths
item.description: The domesticated silk moth, *Bombyx mori*, is a remarkable example of human influence on nature. Shaped over 5,000 years of selective breeding, these moths have become dependent on humans for survival...

item.title: Aston Martin Faces Major Challenges with New F1 Car and Honda Engine
item.description: Aston Martin entered the 2026 Formula 1 season with high expectations, including the arrival of design legend Adrian Newey, a state-of-the-art factory, a strong sponsorship portfolio, and two-time wor...

item.title: Kelly Osbourne Responds to Online Abuse Following Brit Awards Appearance Amid Personal Struggles
item.description: Kelly Osbourne has spoken out against the cruel online trolls who targeted her appearance after she attended the Brit Awards in Manchester on Saturday night. The 41-year-old star was at the event to c...

item.title: Western U.S. Faces Water Shortages and Increased Wildfires Due to Low Snowpack
item.description: The western United States is grappling with unprecedented low snowpack levels in the winter of 2026, a trend that could exacerbate both ecological and political challenges. Snow accumulation is at les...

item.title: Two Young Men from Dereham Die on Snowdon, Remembered Fondly by Tutors
item.description: Two friends from Dereham, Norfolk, Eddie Hill, 20, and Jayden Long, 19, were found dead on Wales's highest mountain, Yr Wyddfa (Snowdon), after concerns about their welfare were raised. Their bodies w...

item.title: GP Practices to Receive Incentives Under New NHS Scheme to Expand Access to Weight Loss Injections
item.description: GP practices in England are set to receive annual bonuses of up to £3,000 for improving obesity care, including prescribing weight loss injections where clinically appropriate. The initiative forms pa...

item.title: Families of Children with Special Educational Needs Worry About SEND Reform Impact
item.description: Parents of children with high-level special educational needs in England have expressed deep concern over upcoming changes to the Special Educational Needs and Disabilities (SEND) system. From 2035, o...

item.title: British Couple in Iran Prison Amid Regional Tensions, Family Expresses Concerns
item.description: The family of British couple Lindsay and Craig Foreman, who are currently imprisoned in Iran, have expressed deep concerns for their safety. The couple, aged 53, were sentenced to ten years in Tehran'...

item.title: Ukraine’s Resilience Amidst Drone Warfare and Russian Advances
item.description: In eastern Ukraine, particularly Donetsk and Slovyansk, the war has entered a new phase dominated by advanced drone warfare, transforming traditional front-line combat. Ukrainian forces have adapted b...

item.title: Mossad's Former Chief Discusses Global Operation of Compromised Equipment
item.description: In a recent interview on 'The Brink' podcast, former Mossad director Yossi Cohen revealed a covert, decades-long program involving the manipulation and planting of compromised equipment worldwide. Coh...

item.title: Russian soldiers report witnessing executions and brutal conditions on the front lines in Ukraine
item.description: Four Russian soldiers have provided detailed testimony to the BBC about extreme violence and abuse they witnessed on the front lines in Ukraine. According to the accounts, commanders ordered execution...

item.title: Man Arrested After Fatal Stabbing at Centre:MK in Milton Keynes
item.description: A man has been arrested on suspicion of murder after a fatal stabbing at Centre:MK, a prominent shopping centre in Milton Keynes. Police were called to the scene around 5.10pm on Saturday following re...

item.title: Peter Mandelson Released on Bail Following Misconduct Investigation
item.description: Lord Peter Mandelson, a former British politician, was released on bail by the Metropolitan Police following his arrest on suspicion of misconduct in public office. The 72-year-old returned to his Lon...

item.title: Life Under Fire in Belgorod: How the Ukraine War Has Reached Russia’s Border City
item.description: Four years after Vladimir Putin launched Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine, the war has reshaped daily life not only in Ukraine but also inside Russia itself, particularly in the border city of ...

item.title: Xiaomi Watch 5 Review: A Powerful Smartwatch with Impressive Battery Life
item.description: The Xiaomi Watch 5 is a high-end Wear OS smartwatch that combines power and performance. Featuring a 47mm stainless steel case, a 1.54-inch AMOLED display with flat sapphire glass, and a significant 9...
